name: ExtensionActivityDefinition_Kind
title: R5: kind
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ActivityDefinition.kind` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ActivityDefinition.kind` 0..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ActivityDefinition.kind` 0..1 `code`
*  R4B: `ActivityDefinition.kind` 0..1 `code`
*  R4: `ActivityDefinition.kind` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ActivityDefinition.kind` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ActivityDefinition.kind` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.comment:
Element `ActivityDefinition.kind` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ActivityDefinition.kind` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The kind element may only specify Request resource types to facilitate considering user input as part of processing the result of any automated clinical reasoning processes. To support creation of event resources, such as Observations, RiskAssessments, and DetectedIssues, use a Task resource with the focus of the task set to the event resource to be created. Note that the kind of resource to be created may determine what types of extensions are permitted.

element.definition: A description of the kind of resource the activity definition is representing. For example, a MedicationRequest, a ServiceRequest, or a CommunicationRequest.
element.comment: The kind element may only specify Request resource types to facilitate considering user input as part of processing the result of any automated clinical reasoning processes. binding.description: The kind of activity the definition is describing.
